reference: ON LEARNING THIS THE NEW PARTY HAD MADE HASTE DURING THE DISPUTE ABOUT FLEROV TO SEND SOME OF THEIR MEN IN A SLEDGE TO CLOTHE THE STRIPPED GENTLEMAN AND TO BRING ALONG ONE OF THE INTOXICATED TO THE MEETING
text: on learning this the new party had made haste during the dispute about flyroff to send some of their men in a sledge to clothe the stripped gentleman and to bring along one of the intoxicated to the meeting
